rows.label: qev092105_MSG0001
rows.name: Camber! Axena? What are you doing here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092105_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm glad to see you too,
idiot. ...Really glad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092105_MSG0004
rows.name:
You two take cover! We've got
more Growth forces inbound.[ST:wait ]
